backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Student, Account, Transaction, BankDetail) and CRUD operations with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that upgrades OldTransaction records to NewTransaction by adding `previousBalance` and `totalAmount` fields defaulting to 0.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the Transaction page form enhancements (Date, Previous Balance, Total Amount fields) to the file TransactionPage.tsx and test ID REQ-28.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, recent changes, and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA with a root div and a module script entry point to src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up QueryClient, AuthProvider, and routes between pages based on authentication state and admin role.
frontend/src/components/AccountForm.tsx: Modal dialog form for creating or editing bank accounts with student/IFSC dropdowns, auto-filled bank name, validation, and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/BankDetailForm.t: A dialog form component for adding or editing bank details (name, IFSC code, taluka, district) with validation and toast notifications, using React Query mutations.
A responsive dashboard layout component that wraps pages with a collapsible sidebar, top header bar showing page title and admin/user role badge.
frontend/src/components/Sidebar.tsx: A responsive sidebar navigation component with role-based visible menu items, user info display, and logout functionality using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/StudentForm.tsx: A dialog form component for adding or editing student records (name, DOB, class, attendance number, school, taluka, district) with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: An auth context provider and hook managing admin/user/guest roles, account number state, and login/logout logic backed by Internet Identity for admin and localStorage for user sessions.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: A context provider and hook wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to manage Internet Identity login state, identity persistence across page reloads, and login/clear operations.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on students, accounts, bank details, transactions, and user profiles, all backed by an ICP actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Poppins/Nunito fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light/dark themes plus gradient utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AccountPage.tsx: Page component for listing, searching, editing, and deleting bank accounts, with an inline AccountForm for creating or updating entries.
frontend/src/pages/BankDetailsPage.tsx: Page component for managing bank detail records (name, IFSC, taluka, district) with search, edit, and delete functionality via BankDetailForm.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Page component that lets users search transaction history by account number and optional date range, displaying results with deposit/withdrawal totals and CSV/print export options.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Dashboard overview page that fetches students, accounts, and transactions to display summary stat cards (total students, accounts, deposits, withdrawals, and current balance) with loading skeletons and a refresh button.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page supporting both admin (via Internet Identity popup) and student/parent (via account number and password) authentication, with tab toggle, error handling, and Marathi UI text.
frontend/src/pages/PassbookPage.tsx: Passbook page that looks up an account by number, displays account holder details and transaction history with running balance, and provides a print option; non-admin users are restricted to their own account.
frontend/src/pages/StudentPage.tsx: Student management page that lists all students in a searchable table with edit and delete actions, and opens a StudentForm modal for creating or editing student records.
frontend/src/pages/TransactionPage.tsx: Transaction page that allows adding deposit or withdrawal transactions to a selected account, shows real-time balance calculation, and displays the transaction history for the selected account.
frontend/src/utils/exportCSV.ts: Utility module providing date and currency formatting helpers, and an exportTransactionsCSV function that generates and downloads a CSV account statement for a given account's transactions.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including bank-specific greens/oranges/teals), border radii, shadows, and keyframe animations for the app's design system.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing a student bank mobile app with admin/user roles, listing existing features, architectural notes, and known issues (broken login and data persistence).
